title: Black Mesa Skyboxes
description: Bring the Black Mesa skyboxes into Minecraft
body:
# Black Mesa Skyboxes
## Bring the Black Mesa skyboxes into Minecraft
[View the pack on my website!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/black-mesa-skyboxes)




This pack adds the skybox textures from the game Black Mesa into Minecraft. Experience the skyboxes from around the Black Mesa facility in the overworld, and the skyboxes from Xen in the End dimension!
